items.title: Israel Proposes Surrounding Prisons With Crocodiles
items.desc: Israel has proposed a radical idea: to use crocodiles to guard prisons. The Jewish state has reportedly reclassified Nile crocodiles as “tended” animals, which could clear the way for the animals' use as part of prison security.

items.title: Russian Strikes Wipe Out Ukrainian Army Fuel Reserves at Port Near Odessa: MoD
items.desc: The precision-guided air strike hit fuel and lubricant storage tanks at Yuzhny Port, some 30 km east of Odessa on the Black Sea Coast. The fuel was intended for use by the Ukrainian Armed Forces, Russia's Defense Ministry said.
